title: Energy Support
subtitle: Nourishing through growing demands
description: As your body continues to support increasing physical demands, you may notice occasional fatigue returning. Including energy-dense foods, healthy snacks, and maintaining hydration can help support your energy and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Consistent appetite with need for more nourishment
Higher demand for sustained energy throughout the day
nutrition_focus: Maintain consistent hydration throughout the day
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, fruit bowls, or curd
Protein sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or relying on irregular eating patterns
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Balanced meals and proper hydration help maintain your energy and comfort.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced meals with snacks help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Eat small, frequent meals and snacks
Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Frequent nourishment supports steady energy levels.

anemia.personalized_description: Iron-rich foods along with consistent meals support energy and reduce fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Regular nourishment supports your energy and strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and hydration support stable blood pressure and comfort.
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced meals and hydration support a steady routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent meals and proper hydration support metabolic balance and energy.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency and hydration support your body's rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, combining balanced meals, healthy snacks, and proper hydration helps maintain energy and stability.
priority_nutrition: Maintain regular meal and snack timings
Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady nourishment and hydration support your overall well-being.
